channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Edman hits leadoff HR filling in for Ohtani and Yamamoto strikes out 10 as Dodgers beat Texas 3-0
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — Yoshinobu Yamamoto matched his career high with 10 strikeouts over seven innings after Tommy Edman led off the game with a home run and the Los Angeles Dodgers beat the Texas Rangers 3-0 on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN HAWKINS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Inside the numbers: Led by Cleveland and Oklahoma City, it was the season of the streak in the NBA
item.description: It was the year of the long winning streak in the NBA. There were five instances of teams winning 11 or more games in a row — three by Cleveland, two by Oklahoma City, and it's probably no coincidence that those two teams are the ones that earned No.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Lindblad joins Buhai atop the leaderboard in the LPGA Tour's JM Eagle LA Championship
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Ingrid Lindblad took a share of the lead into the weekend at El Caballero Country Club in only the fourth start of her rookie season on the LPGA Tour.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Herro scores 30 points to lead Heat past Hawks 123-114 in play-in and into NBA playoffs
item.description: Tyler Herro scored 30 points while sinking two 3-pointers in overtime and the Miami Heat regrouped after losing an early lead to beat the Atlanta Hawks 123-114 on Friday night and make NBA Play-In Tournament history.
item.dc:creator: Charles Odum, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Former Cal, Monte Vista tight end Jack Endries commits to Texas after leaving Golden Bears
item.description: Monte Vista High football alum Jack Endries commits to Texas after two strong seasons at Cal, including freshman All-American and all-ACC honorable mention campaigns
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, The Mercury News

item.title: Tucker hits 2-run HR, Cubs score 6 in 8th after giving up 10 in top half to beat Diamondbacks 13-11
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — Kyle Tucker had the fans on their feet, roaring and pumping their fists as he rounded the bases after hitting the go-ahead two-run homer in the eighth inning. His screaming line drive cleared the right-field wall with plenty of room to spare.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Shohei Ohtani away from the Los Angeles Dodgers for birth of his first child
item.description: ARLINGTON, Texas (AP) — Shohei Ohtani is away from the Los Angeles Dodgers for the birth of the two-way superstar's first child. Manager Dave Roberts said before the Dodgers' series opener Friday night in Texas that Ohtani was with his wife. Ohtani was placed on MLB's paternity list.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Gregg Popovich has medical incident in restaurant, is resting at home, AP source says
item.description: San Antonio coach Gregg Popovich is doing well at home after needing medical attention earlier this week following an incident at a restaurant, a person with knowledge of the matter told The Associated Press on Friday.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: NHL sets another attendance record, topping 23 million fans for the 1st time
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — The NHL has set another attendance record and surpassed 23 million fans for the first time. The league on Friday reported an attendance figure of 23,014,458 over the 1,312-game regular season.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: How Warriors plan to combat Houston’s rough-and-tumble style in playoffs
item.description: Golden State Warriors look to say ‘composed and poised’ against gritty Rockets team with longtime Bay Area foes
item.dc:creator: Joseph Dycus, The Mercury News

item.title: Yankees' Jazz Chisholm Jr. suspended 1 game following ejection, violation of social media policy
item.description: New York Yankees second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. was suspended for one game and fined by Major League Baseball on Friday following his ejection during a game at the Tampa Bay Rays and violation of MLB’s social media policy.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Trump and MLB Commissioner Rob Manfred have meeting at White House amid Pete Rose debate
item.description: President Donald Trump and MLB Commissioner Rob Manfred reportedly met at the White House Wednesday amid debate about Pete Rose's Hall of Fame candidacy.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Spurs coach Gregg Popovich has medical emergency while recovering from stroke: report
item.description: As he continues to recover from a stroke he had late last year, Gregg Popovich reportedly experienced a medical emergency that landed him in a hospital Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: White Sox look to stop 4-game slide, take on the Red Sox
item.description: Chicago White Sox (4-14, fifth in the AL Central) vs. Boston Red Sox (10-10, third in the AL East) Boston; Friday, 7:10 p.m.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: PWHL chooses Vancouver as 1st expansion city with 2nd market to be determined, AP source says
item.description: The PWHL’s first expansion team will be based in Vancouver with an announcement scheduled for next week, a person with knowledge of the decision confirmed to The Associated Press on Friday. The person spoke on the condition of anonymity because the league has not revealed its plans.
item.dc:creator: JOHN WAWROW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Saints All-Pro tackle Ryan Ramczyk, 30, retires after battling through knee injury
item.description: New Orleans Saints tackle Ryan Ramczyk is stepping away from football after eight years, the All-Pro announced Thursday in a social media post.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Prep spotlight: St. Francis No. 1 on field and in dugout; Granada treks to North Carolina
item.description: Clayton Valley baseball bounces back from tough season. Two Mt. Diablo basketball players moving on to bigger things. Northgate students chase equestrian, Olympic dreams. South Bay All-Star basketball game raises money to fight cancer.
item.dc:creator: Christian Babcock, Nathan Canilao, The Mercury News

item.title: Dozens of 5th graders to complete 260-mile bike trek across California
item.description: Fifty-seven fifth graders rode their bikes across the state of California over seven days, testing their mental and physical strength and boosting their confidence and self-esteem.
item.dc:creator: Troy Hirsch, Fox 5

item.title: Utah Hockey Club excited about future
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club was hoping its first season in Salt Lake City would end with a playoff berth, but they still are extremely thankful for the fan support they received in their inaugural season.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Bears announce plans for Chicago NFL draft party at Soldier Field
item.description: The Chicago Bears announced their lineup of activities and entertainment for their NFL draft party on April 24, 2025, at Soldier Field, featuring exclusive on-field access, behind-the-scenes moments, and interactive activities, as well as appearances by current and former Bears players.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Awkward? Rays host Yankees at Steinbrenner Field for first time ever
item.description: This is the first time the Tampa Bay Rays and New York Yankees, the division rivals, will face each other this season.
item.dc:creator: Aileen Hnatiuk, WFLA, NBC

item.title: Report: TJ Edwards signs extension with the Bears
item.description: The Chicago Bears have signed linebacker TJ Edwards to a two-year, $20 million extension, with $16.6 million in guaranteed money, following the extension of defensive back Kyler Gordon.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: Devon Dampier ready to take the reigns
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - As spring practice wraps up this week for the Utah football team, new quarterback Devon Dampier is getting more and more comfortable. It helps having played in new offensive coordinator Jason Beck's system the last two seasons at New Mexico.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Golden State Warriors warn fans of counterfeit playoff tickets
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (KRON) -- The Golden State Warriors narrowly clinched a spot in the 2025 NBA Playoffs after a home win Tuesday night against the Memphis Grizzlies. Scammers, the team warned in a new advisory, are also looking to win big by selling fans counterfeit tickets.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Mense, KRON4

item.title: Utah HC loses to St. Louis in season finale, 6-1
item.description: ST. LOUIS (ABC4 Sports) - The historic inaugural season for the Utah Hockey Club has officially come to an end. Clayton Keller scored his 30th goal of the season, but Utah could not overcome a four-goal barrage in the first period by the Blues in a 6-1 loss.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Hendricks plans to come back stronger than ever
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - This was supposed to be the season Taylor Hendricks took a big step forward. After showing promising signs his rookie year, in which he averaged 7.3 points in 40 games, Hendricks was excited to be a big part of the Jazz rebuild.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Warriors host Memphis Grizzlies in NBA play-in game Tuesday at Chase Center
item.description: SAN FRANCISCO (BCN) -- The Golden State Warriors missed a chance to clinch a National Basketball Association playoff spot in their last regular season game on Sunday but will get another chance when they host a play-in game Tuesday against the Memphis Grizzlies at Chase Center in San Francisco.
item.dc:creator: Bay City News, KRON4

item.title: Nazar scores in shootout to give Blackhawks 4-3 win over Canadiens
item.description: Frank Nazar scored the only goal of the shootout, and the Chicago Blackhawks beat Montreal 4-3 on Monday night, spoiling Canadiens rookie Ivan Demidov's NHL debut.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Hear from Masters champion Rory McIlroy and longtime friend Tony Finau
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) -- Rory McIlroy won the Masters yesterday to become the sixth player to complete the career Grand Slam. It was a long time coming for the Irishman -- and nobody was happier for him than Tony Finau, who has known McIlrory for a long time. "It's quite cool.
item.dc:creator: Wesley Ruff, ABC 4

item.title: NBA's West spots set, with the Nuggets, Clippers and Timberwolves in and the Warriors play-in bound
item.description: The Los Angeles Clippers worked overtime to clinch a playoff spot — and send the Golden State Warriors to the NBA's play-in tournament.
item.dc:creator: BRIAN MAHONEY, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Fan reaches into Mike Trout's glove to snatch a catch from Angels outfielder
item.description: A fan grabbed the ball out of Mike Trout's glove after the Los Angeles Angels star reached into the right field stands Saturday night to make what appeared to be a great catch against the Houston Astros
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Game 82: The end of the line for some in the NBA, decision day for others
item.description: Game 82 for every team in the NBA has arrived. For 10 clubs, it's the end of the season. For 13 others, it's one last game before the postseason. And for seven teams in the Western Conference, Game 82 might feel like Game 7.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Fruita and Palisade show off defensive skill in 2-1 Wildcats win
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — We had an absolute showdown between two worthy Southwestern League foes at Suplizio Field Friday. Fruita pitchers Gavin Cardoza (1.62 ERA Friday) and Noah Brackett (0 ERA Friday) shut down Palisade's offense after a first-inning run.
item.dc:creator: Big Will Levenson, KREX 5
